definitions.text: A hummed tune, i.e. created orally with lips closed.
An often indistinct sound resembling human humming.
examples: They could hear a hum coming from the kitchen, and found the dishwasher on.

definitions.text: Busy activity, like the buzz of a beehive.
To make a sound from the vocal cords without pronouncing any real words, with one's lips closed.
examples: We are humming happily along with the music.
The team hummed “We Shall Overcome” as they came back onto the field after the break.

definitions.text: To drone like certain insects naturally do in motion, or sounding similarly.
Synonym of hmm: a noise indicating thought, consideration, c.
Synonym of um: a noise indicating doubt, uncertainty, c.
Synonym of see hum (“blood cockles, ark clams”).
